bank_transfer_payment_steps_tip.value:
1. Enter the amount you want to deposit and click the “Top Up Now” button.
  2. You will be given a temporary transfer account (expires after 30 minutes).
  3. Transfer the exact amount entered via online banking or USSD to make successful deposits. 
  4. Deposits usually reflect within 10 minutes. If it hasn’t appeared after an hour, please contact your bank for assistance.

quickteller_deposit_steps_tip.value:
Step 1
Visit https://www.quickteller.com/sportybet
Step 2
Enter your SportyBet Login Mobile Phone Number: {phoneNumber}, The amount you wish to deposit, your Email.
Step 3
Verify payment details and click on PAY
Step 4
A payment receipt will be generated and you will receive an email notification to the email provided.

spei_info_dialog_nuvei_1.value: Use both exactly as shown on the receipt when completing the transaction from your banking app.

spei_by_stp_payment_steps_tip.value:
1. Register the CLABE in your bank’s online portal (bank should be STP).
  2. Transfer exactly {value}, or it will be rejected.
  3. Verify the digital receipt for accuracy.

pix_how_to_deposit_instructions.value:
1. Tap "Pix Copy and Paste".
  2. Open your homebanking app.
    • Option A: Your app may detect the copied code and prompt you to complete the payment. Follow the app's instructions.
    • Option B: If not, go to the Pix section in your homebanking app, choose "Pix Copy and Paste" and complete the payment manually.
  3. Return to this page, we'll validate your deposit. This may take up to {value} seconds.

pix_payment_steps_tip.value:
1. Tap “Pix Copy and Paste”.
  2. Open your homebanking app.
    • Option A: Your app may detect the copied code and prompt you to complete the payment. Follow the app’s instructions.
    • Option B: If not, go to the Pix section in your homebanking app, choose “Pix Copy and Paste” and complete the payment manually.
  3. Return to this page, we’ll validate your deposit. This may take up to {num} seconds.
